governance.permitted_use: Research and benchmarking; private use only.
governance.redistribution_rights: Eigenvector page says the data are available for download but no explicit redistribution license was detected.

identity.description: CORN Eigenvector NIR. v2.0 standardized NIRS package: 3 spectral source(s), 4 declared target(s). Auto-generated from dataset_card.json (verify before publication).
